gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps forward with excitement, opens both arms wide, and smiles while announcing the topic of 555
a person tilts their head slightly, raises a hand to their chin, and looks upward as if pondering the number 555
a tutor points at an imaginary chart with their right hand, emphasizing the hundreds place while highlighting the first digit
a person sways gently to the side, placing their left hand on their hip and raising the right hand to show the tens place
a tutor gestures with both hands open, moving them downwards to show the ones place, while explaining the last digit
a person steps back slightly, crossing their arms and nodding while inviting the class to compare 555 with 222
a tutor leans forward, points first at 555 and then at 222, while asking if one number is bigger than the other
a person raises both hands into the air joyfully, clapping once while celebrating that 555 is bigger than 222
a tutor stands tall, spreading their arms apart, and smiles while summarizing the components of the number 555
a person claps both hands together, nods enthusiastically, and smiles brightly while praising the students' progress
